protocol.persona_stability_gate: at least 2 of 3 personas must not regress on both metrics

replay_session_policy.method: Query topics use only evidence available before each query. Each query is then matched to at most one nearest subsequent click within the configured window when query and answer topics overlap.
replay_session_policy.evidence_boundary: Heuristic pseudo-sessions only; the source dataset has no search-result exposure log.

conclusion: No preregistered arm beat or separated from the baseline on validation Recall@10/NDCG@10, so no arm was selected and the final 20% split was not rerun for this redesign. That split is not a pristine holdout because earlier 80/20 experiments had already used it.
